description: Composition Green leggings made of 100% cotton with an elasticated waist and a drawstring inside Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Stylish and in-vogue, this pair of leggings from biba has a hint of retro chic, making it a contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to fit to your shape, making sure every day is perfect for leggings. Style this with a kurta and clunky heels or with a tunic and belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”, waist 26” and hips 36”
